title: Cynorkis graminea
taxonomy: Cynorkis graminea is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. This plant is classified as a type of flowering plant, belonging to the kingdom Plantae. More specifically, it falls under the division Magnoliophyta and the class Liliopsida. Within the family Orchidaceae, Cynorkis graminea is a member of the subfamily Orchidoideae and the tribe Orchideae. The genus Cynorkis is a part of the subtribe Orchidinae.
uses: Cynorkis graminea is known to be used in traditional medicine, particularly in Africa. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues.
